title: Solar Planet
description: Resource Pack that changes the Moon Phase to the Planets in the Solar System
body:
![Neptune(FOV:100)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60b6c6c56ef306cb77e5a07635fd981d09912deb_0.webp)<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/waOwZWR2USc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>![Saturn (FOV:100)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa9bb938546f947901c51a97e573b255628fcaea_0.webp) Turn Minecraft’s Moon into the Solar System!
Solar Planet Vietnam replaces the default moon phases with stunning, realistic renders of 7 major planets (except Earth) plus Pluto. Each night in Minecraft, a different planet will light up your sky – from fiery Mercury and Venus to the iconic rings of Saturn.

Whether you’re an astronomy enthusiast, a sci-fi builder, or just want a fresh cosmic vibe for your worlds, this pack is for you. Install, look up, and enjoy the beauty of space without leaving your blocky universe!

Features:

🌌 7 major planets + Pluto as moon phases

⚡ Smooth integration – no mods required


V.0.3 Comming soon!
